import { expect, expectTypeOf, test } from "vitest"; import * as z from "zod/v4"; test("check any inference", () => { const t1 = z.any(); t1.optional(); t1.nullable(); type t1 = z.infer<typeof t1>; expectTypeOf<t1>().toEqualTypeOf<any>(); }); test("check unknown inference", () => { const t1 = z.unknown(); t1.optional(); t1.nullable(); type t1 = z.infer<typeof t1>; expectTypeOf<t1>().toEqualTypeOf<unknown>(); }); test("check never inference", () => { const t1 = z.never(); expect(() => t1.parse(undefined)).toThrow(); expect(() => t1.parse("asdf")).toThrow(); expect(() => t1.parse(null)).toThrow(); });
